examples: We escaped from the hustle and bustle of the city for the weekend.
The calm of the countryside came as a welcome relief from the hustle and bustle of city life.
The hotel offers a haven of peace and serenity away from the bustle of the city.
Scores of developing countries around the world do not lack entrepreneurial hustle and bustle.
He wears a men's traditional warrior outfit which includes a giant eagle feather headdress and bustle.
